overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The scene features wet streets reflecting neon lights, towering buildings with holographic advertisements, and transitions from open sidewalks to a covered market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with storefronts and street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and street debris

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large red digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
rusted metal elevated highway ramp with support beams
building facade with graffiti and illuminated shop windows
tall modern street lamp with orange glowing light
scattered garbage bags and debris on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wet concrete sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk city at dusk. To the left, a multi-lane street has sparse traffic, while the right side features storefronts with graffiti. A massive tower with a bright red billboard dominates the skyline ahead, and the street is littered with trash piles.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with elevated metro track

events.description: reaches the intersection and begins crossing the street, opening up view to the elevated metro structure
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection, including a black sedan and a white car

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: massive elevated train track structure spanning the intersection with multiple illuminated advertisement billboards attached
traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to an open crosswalk. An impressive elevated metro track with glowing advertisements spans overhead. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the player crosses, and the Sequoia street sign becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street lined with palm trees approaching market district

events.description: continuing straight along the street, passing palm trees and approaching the covered market structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge, passing parked cars and palm trees while approaching a large covered market

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center divider of the street
large industrial stadium or arena structure visible in the distance
long concrete building with open sides and red interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wide street lined with palm trees, moving away from the intersection. The elevated metro track recedes behind as a large covered market structure with glowing red interior lights becomes the focal point ahead. The distant silhouette of a stadium is visible against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market with red neon lighting and vendor stalls

events.description: enters the covered market area, transitioning from open sky to concrete roof shelter with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered market, passing between concrete pillars and vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near a cart in the middle of the market walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete roof and support beams creating a sheltered market space
rows of red fluorescent tube lights illuminating the ceiling
vendor booths with tarps and equipment set up along the sides
concrete benches and planters on the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered market area sheltered by a massive concrete roof. The environment shifts from natural dusk light to artificial red neon tube lighting. Vendor stalls line the sides of the walkway, and concrete pillars support the overhead structure. The open sky is replaced by industrial concrete architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city at dusk, transitioning from an open urban street into a claustrophobic, neon-lit market. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk flanked by graffiti-covered storefronts and trash piles, moving toward a massive tower topped with a bright red billboard. As the camera enters a wide intersection, the enclosed feeling of the sidewalk gives way to an open crosswalk beneath a glowing elevated metro track and a Sequoia street sign. The scene then shifts as the camera moves past palm trees and away from the intersection, with the darkening sky and a distant stadium silhouette framing a large covered market ahead. Finally, the open air is replaced by industrial concrete architecture as the camera enters the market, where the natural dusk light fades into the artificial glow of red neon tubes and vendor stalls.
